title: BHN WireGuard Peer Bandwidth
description: Per-peer bandwidth derived from cumulative wg_peer_stats samples. The hub's view: 'sent to peer' = bytes_sent, 'received from peer' = bytes_received. Spike alert fires on server peers (Frankfurt/NJ/Hillsboro) for >1GB sent in 1h; personal peers (Phone/PC) excluded.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(measured_at, '5m') AS time, peer_label AS metric, COALESCE((MAX(bytes_sent) - MIN(bytes_sent))::float / NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(measured_at) - MIN(measured_at))), 0), 0) AS rate_bps FROM wg_peer_stats WHERE $__timeFilter(measured_at) AND peer_label NOT LIKE 'Unknown-%' GROUP BY 1, peer_label HAVING (MAX(bytes_sent) - MIN(bytes_sent)) >= 0 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(measured_at, '5m') AS time, peer_label AS metric, COALESCE((MAX(bytes_received) - MIN(bytes_received))::float / NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(measured_at) - MIN(measured_at))), 0), 0) AS rate_bps FROM wg_peer_stats WHERE $__timeFilter(measured_at) AND peer_label NOT LIKE 'Unknown-%' GROUP BY 1, peer_label HAVING (MAX(bytes_received) - MIN(bytes_received)) >= 0 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Current session totals (latest sample per peer)

targets.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (peer_ip) peer_label, peer_ip, bytes_sent, bytes_received, latest_handshake, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - latest_handshake))/60 AS handshake_age_min, endpoint FROM wg_peer_stats ORDER BY peer_ip, measured_at DESC
